room.caption: [NightmareC4] Removing Claire's shadow removed the biggest level design obstacle and kept things less complicated for the player.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="!!CAUTION!!#No dashing allowed here!#Why? Because reasons!!" signSize=2
GID_SET(199736, self.id) xSpd=0 ySpd=8 sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 image_yscale=4
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=5 xDir=4 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=20
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=5 xDir=4 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=20
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=5 xDir=4 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=20
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=5 xDir=4 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=20
